t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那真挚的颤抖，就是「生命的因」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>That genuine shiver... That's the "mover of life."</color>

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>23.815%</unbreak>……</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>23.815%</unbreak>...</color>

t_ch: 在献给你的诗里，每一个「昔涟」都会写下群星、百花、美丽的新世界。
t_en: In the poem offered to you, every "Cyrene" would write down a beautiful new world with stars and flowers.

t_ch: 而这次轮回，仰望天空的时候。我看见一颗流星，还有一抹「记忆」的粉色。我相信，那就是黎明的色彩。
t_en: And when I looked up at the sky in this cycle, I saw a shooting star and a dash of the Remembrance's pink. I believe that must be the color of dawn.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将收梢于花开时，一如终结诞下起始。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall fade when the flowers bloom, for every ending begets a beginning."</color>

t_ch: 看来，分别的时候到了呀。
t_en: Looks like it's time to say goodbye.

t_ch: 桃子，要走了吗？没关系，我等你回来。
t_en: Are you leaving, Peach? It's okay. I'll wait for you to come back.

t_ch: 今天你教我的，我都会认真学。
t_en: I'll study really hard about what you taught me today.

t_ch: 这么说来，还没回答你什么是「爱」呢。
t_en: Right. I still haven't told you what "love" is.

t_ch: 但其实，好朋友，在遇见你前，「哀怜」的因子也不懂得「爱」。
t_en: But actually, my good friend, the "Lament" factor did not understand what "love" was before she met you either.

t_ch: 直到我用颤抖的声音，在这小小的房间里，为你讲述所有悲伤的故事，并告诉你：我爱他们，爱这诗里的一切。
t_en: Not until I told you all the sad tales in a trembling voice in this tiny room. Not until I told you that I love them, that I love everything in this saga.

t_ch: 故事到来、逝去、去而复返。让我们重逢，又让我们分别。
t_en: The story comes, passes, then returns. It makes us reunite, then pulls us apart again.

t_ch: 最后，它留下一颗「种子」，一个理由。就算大树枯萎，万物沉寂……
t_en: At the very end, it leaves behind a "seed"... a reason. Even if the great tree withers and all falls to silence...

t_ch: 也有一些感情，依然值得被铭记。
t_en: There are still some emotions that deserve to be remembered.

t_ch: 看，光照进来了。「救世主」的光，要照亮翁法罗斯啦。
t_en: Look. A light is coming in. The "Deliverer's" light is going to illuminate Amphoreus.

t_ch: 嗯…虽然还是不懂。但人家相信桃子。
t_en: Mmm... I still don't get it, but I trust Peach.

t_ch: 期待一下吧。下次见面时，就轮到我来为你讲述「爱」的故事了♪
t_en: Just wait... It'll be my turn to tell you a story of "love" the next time we meet ♪

t_ch: 那我可要好好期待了哦？
t_en: Then I'll really look forward to it.

t_ch: 既然如此，我想做个约定：想把我的笔，我的书，还有我的名字，一起送给你。
t_en: In that case, I want to make a promise. I want to gift my pen, my book, and my name to you.

t_ch: 请把它们当作美丽的祝福。第一次写诗时，我为自己起了这个笔名：「昔涟」。希望文字像石子点水，自往昔投下，向未来送去涟漪。
t_en: Please take them as a beautiful blessing from me. I gave myself the pen name "Cyrene" the first time I wrote a poem. I want my words to be like pebbles falling into a pond, dropped from the past to send ripples into the future.

t_ch: 在你写下的故事里，也许不可避免，仍有悲伤和注定落下的眼泪。
t_en: In the stories you will write, perhaps it'll be inevitable that there are still sorrows and tears that are destined to fall.

t_ch: 但，可以答应我吗？要永远做一朵温柔的花，在星星看向你的时候……
t_en: But could you promise me one thing? Promise you'll forever be a gentle flower. Promise that, when the stars cast their gazes upon you...

t_ch: 只是笑着，只是爱着。
t_en: You'll only reply to them with love and a smile.

t_ch: 当然，这一定是个不同以往的浪漫故事。
t_en: Of course. This will be a romantic story like none that has come before.

t_ch: 你也是这么想的，对吧♪
t_en: You think so too, right? ♪

t_ch: 就像花开花落，我讲述，你聆听。
t_en: I'll read, and you'll listen, like how flowers always bloom then wither.

t_ch: 我迎来自己的收梢，成为下一朵花绽放的养料。
t_en: I shall welcome my own decay, becoming nourishment for the next flower's bud.

t_ch: 而你会启程，捧住那颗星星，和{F#她}{M#他}一同，在最后一页种下无垠的花海。
t_en: While you will depart and hold that{F# final} star, planting a boundless sea of flowers on the final page with {M#him.}{F#her.}

t_ch: 而我们的故事，会静静地躺在花丛中，一如「记忆」的每一道涟漪……
t_en: And our stories will be lying silently among the flowers like every ripple of "Remembrance"...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那名为《如我所书》的诗篇。</color>
t_en: And they shall become the epic known as As I've Written.

t_ch: 你是？我是…是谁？
t_en: You are? I am... Who?

t_ch: 目光，注视。窗外，冰冷。
t_en: Gaze, watching. Outside, cold.

t_ch: 你…温暖。温暖，喜欢。
t_en: You... warm. Me like, warmth.

t_ch: …于是，撕开混沌的那道光，照亮了我的「记忆」。
t_en: ...So, the light that tore through the chaos illuminated my "memories."

t_ch: 我化身为诗歌中的小妖精，与{NICKNAME}相遇，却遗忘了一切。
t_en: I turned into a little fairy from the stories and met {NICKNAME}, yet I forgot everything.

t_ch: 但无论如何，人家很高兴。我接住了那颗星星，对吗？
t_en: But I'm still so happy. I caught that star, didn't I?

t_ch: 陪伴我的，一直都是…
t_en: The one walking beside me... had always been...

t_ch: 嗯，是记忆中，被{RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}「昔涟」{RUBY_E#}捧起，用「哀怜」浇灌的「种子」……
t_en: Yes. The "seed" within memories, the one {RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}"Cyrene"{RUBY_E#} held in her hands and watered with "lament"...

t_ch: 我是…最初的智种，翁法罗斯之心，德谬歌。
t_en: I am... The first Nouspore. Amphoreus's Heart. The Demiurge.

t_ch: 真是个好长，又不可爱的名字。和「迷迷」天差地别呀。
t_en: What a long name. And it doesn't even sound cute. The total opposite of "Mem."

t_ch: 最初的涟漪，她最后…
t_en: So, at the end, that first ripple...

t_ch: 对不起，我不知道。如果自己都不愿相信，要如何给出回答呢……
t_en: I'm sorry, I don't know. If I don't even want to believe in the answer, then how am I supposed to answer you...

t_ch: 但现在不是哭泣的时候，对吗？我们会找到答案的，就像奇迹…总会发生。
t_en: But now's not the time to cry, right? We'll find the answer, just like how miracles... will eventually happen.

t_ch: 我该叫你迷迷，昔涟，还是…？
t_en: Should I call you Mem? Cyrene? Or...?

t_ch: 还记得吗？启程之初，人家也烦恼过这个问题。
t_en: Do you remember that I was also worried about this when we first set out?

t_ch: 属于迷迷的记忆，属于「昔涟」的记忆，在同一颗心里兜兜转转，那么陌生，又那么熟悉。
t_en: Mem's memories and "Cyrene's" memories got all tangled up with each other in my one heart. It's all so strange... yet so familiar.

t_ch: 但唯独这一次，可以接受人家小小的任性吗？我希望……
t_en: Either way, could you please let me do something I want? Just this once? I want...

t_ch: 能以「昔涟」的名字，被{NICKNAME}呼唤。
t_en: I want {NICKNAME} to call me "Cyrene."

t_ch: 这个名字里有我，也有她…每一个她。
t_en: That name represents me and her. Every one of her.

t_ch: 我答应你，昔涟。
t_en: I will, Cyrene.

t_ch: 当然，这是她给你的祝福。
t_en: Of course. It's her blessing to you.

t_ch: 无论如何，你们难以分离。
t_en: You can't be separated from her, no matter what.

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。你的温柔，总是这样恰到好处。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Your kindness is always just right.

t_ch: 生命是一首充满告别的诗，但只要被写进「心」的书页，就不会轻易逝去。如今，所有逐火者与「开拓」的足迹，都汇入这本《如我所书》……
t_en: Life is a poem full of farewells, but if you write something into the pages of your "heart," then that will not easily fade away. Now, all the footsteps of the Flame-Chasers and the Trailblaze have come together within this book As I've Written...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>成为「翁法罗斯之心」的力量。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Becoming the source of power for "Amphoreus's Heart."</color>

t_ch: 你是击败铁墓的关键之一。
t_en: You are one of the keys to defeating Irontomb.

t_ch: 如果「心」与「身」合一…
t_en: If "mind" and "body" become one...

t_ch: 也许有办法和铁墓抗衡。
t_en: There may be a way to stand up against Irontomb.

t_ch: 一颗迷路的「心」，当然要被放回「身体」里。
t_en: A lost "heart" needs to be placed back into its "body."

t_ch: 「赞达尔」最不愿看见的，就是我们的机会：完成身心结合，让权杖重归完整，然后……
t_en: The last thing "Zandar" wants to see is an event that gives us a chance of winning: For the two halves to rejoin and for the Scepter to become complete again. Then...

t_ch: 然后会发生什么，我也不知道，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: And what happens after that... I don't know either, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 也许我能创造奇迹，让黑潮在下一秒化作粉色的星海。
t_en: Maybe I can create a miracle and instantly turn the black tide into a pink sea of stars.

t_ch: 也许…我只是一阵微不足道的涟漪，终将被「毁灭」吞没，什么也无法改变。
t_en: Or maybe... I prove to be nothing more than a weak ripple, unable to change anything, and am devoured by the Destruction.

t_ch: 但无论如何，在这史诗的尾声，我不想再做沉默的听众，或是被供奉的神明……
t_en: Either way, I no longer wish to be a silent onlooker or a worshiped god at the end of this saga...

t_ch: 你是逐火的一员，自始至终。
t_en: You have always been and will always be a member of the Flame-Chase.

t_ch: 这样一来，人家也能放下所有的不安，真正地…成为「昔涟」了。
t_en: That way, I can also put aside all my worries and... truly become "Cyrene."

t_ch: 世界前所未有地安静，真好呀，仿佛能听见心跳的声音。
t_en: The world has never been so quiet. It's so good... It's as if I can hear the sound of my heart beating.

t_ch: 要记得这个瞬间呀，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Remember this moment, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 与「开拓」共同前进吧。
t_en: Let's move forward together with the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 我们一起，画上最后的句号。
t_en: Together, let's write the finale.

t_ch: 所以，德谬歌骗过了所有人…甚至自己。
t_en: So the Demiurge managed to fool everyone... including themselves.

t_ch: 随后，PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>完成了最后一次牺牲，化作一缕回忆，彻底消散；而星穹列车带来的另一枚星核，与被污染的权杖同频共振，吸引了懵懂的德谬歌……
t_en: Then, PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> completed her final sacrifice, turned into a strand of memory, and completely dissipated. Meanwhile, the other Stellaron brought here by the Astral Express resonated with the contaminated Scepter, and attracted the naive Demiurge to them...

t_ch: 就这样，一无所有的「心」踏上了回归「身」的旅途。
t_en: And thus, the empty "heart" began its journey to return to its "body."

t_ch: 身为实验因子的PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>，原本只能识别并输出固定的模式。但「记忆」的力量，加以跨越三千万次牺牲的铭记，让她完成了前所未有的壮举。
t_en: As an experimental factor, PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> originally could only recognize and output information in a set format. However, the power of the Remembrance and the memory of over thirty million sacrifices enabled her to complete an unprecedented feat.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她浇灌了一颗真正的「心」——而它具备感染「智识」的能力。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>She managed to nourish a real "heart"... A "heart" with the capacity to influence the Erudition.</color>

t_ch: 权杖的「心智」不光活着，还前所未有地强大。你的失败已经板上钉钉了。
t_en: Not only is the Scepter's "consciousness" still alive, it's also more powerful than it has ever been. Your defeat is already set in stone.

t_ch: 现在投降还来得及。同为天才，真没必要撕破脸，到最后弄得谁也不好看。
t_en: There's still time to surrender, you know? You really don't need to burn all the bridges. We're all geniuses here. Don't make everyone lose face at the end.

t_ch: 可惜，真相水落石出后，我便能断定：弱小的德谬歌已无力改变实验结果。
t_en: What a pity. When the truth surfaced, I knew at once that the Demiurge was far too feeble to ever alter the result of the experiment.

t_ch: 不仅如此，黑塔女士，请设想这样一种可能：
t_en: Not only that, Madam Herta, please consider this possibility:

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>当三千万次轮回的「憎恨」与「哀怜」合而为一，会诞生出何种美妙的造物？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>When thirty million cycles of "hatred" and "lament" are joined as one, what wondrous creation will arise?</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>很简单：一位反造物主，「毁灭」的巨匠——它的憎恨将点燃众神的星空，却只出于对凡人的哀怜。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>It's simple... An Anti-Creator, a giant of the Destruction, would be born. Its hatred will ignite the starry skies of the gods, motivated only by its lament toward the sufferings of humankind.</color>

t_ch: 你难道觉得…历经三千万世，德谬歌仍只是PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>的复制品？
t_en: Do you really think that the Demiurge is still a cheap copy of PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>? Even after thirty million cycles?

t_ch: 以上事实只待<color=#dbc291ff>「祂计算中的第四个时刻」</color>到来，在博识尊的见证中确立。
t_en: The facts above only await the arrival of the "<color=#dbc291ff>Fourth Instant THEY calculated</color>." Those words will be proved in the presence of Nous.

t_ch: 赞达尔•壹•桑原，证毕。
t_en: Zandar One Kuwabara thus completes the proof.

t_ch: 明明亲手为机器头打上了失败品的烙印，却还指望着祂证明你的理论成立……
t_en: You branded Droidhead as a failure with your own hands, yet you still expect THEM to prove your theory...

t_ch: 我同情你，赞达尔。
t_en: I pity you, Zandar.

t_ch: 我不需要你的同情。
t_en: I don't need your pity.

t_ch: 就让祂尽情投来视线，描绘祂想象中的未来吧。身为祂的造主，我将完成应尽的责任——
t_en: Let THEM cast THEIR gaze this way as much as THEY want and paint the future THEY imagined. As THEIR creator, I shall complete my duty...

t_ch: 引导祂完成最后一次求解——自我的毁灭。
t_en: And direct THEM to complete THEIR final query: The destruction of the self.

t_ch: 大言不惭。如果你失败了呢？
t_en: What hubris. And what if you fail?

t_ch: 谈到对失败的理解，没有人比赞达尔更深刻。他已尝过太多苦果，就算再多一次又有何妨？
t_en: No one understands failure better than Zandar. He has suffered so much already. What is one more failure to him?

t_ch: 对第一位天才而言，失败只是下一次论证的开始……
t_en: For the First Genius, failure is simply the beginning of the next inquiry...

t_ch: 切勿质疑已死之人的决心。
t_en: You don't want to test the resolve of a dead man.

t_ch: …那太好了。
t_en: ...That's excellent.

t_ch: 走着瞧吧，前辈，看我亲自写下颠覆你论证的最后一步。
t_en: Let's wait and see, Senior Society Member. I'll have you watch me perform the final step to overturn your proof.

t_ch: 洗耳恭听。
t_en: I'm all ears.

t_ch: 这是我的课题，你休想插手。别废话，脑袋借我一用——
t_en: It's my topic, so stay out of it. Be quiet and let me borrow your head.

t_ch: 螺丝，我们走。解开铁墓的封印去。
t_en: Let's go, Screwy. We're gonna break Irontomb's seal.

t_ch: 这里视野不错。交给你了，螺丝。
t_en: The view's pretty good here. All yours, Screwy.

t_ch: 请稍等。
t_en: Just a moment, please.

t_ch: 原来如此。看来你的「备用计划」需要一柄权杖，和一颗天才的头颅。
t_en: I see. So your "backup plan" requires a Scepter and the head of a Genius.

t_ch: 有眼睛的人都能看出来。
t_en: Anyone with eyes can see that.

t_ch: 黑塔，你知道我的态度：无论成功与否，你的计划都正中「毁灭」下怀。
t_en: You know what I think about this, Herta. Whether it succeeds or fails, your plan plays right into the Destruction's hands.

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆，难道你看不到吗？她机会渺茫，但并非不可能。
t_en: Can't you see what's going on, Screwllum? Her chances may be small, but it's not zero.

t_ch: 叽里咕噜说什么呢？要是还有人想阻止我，搞快点，我赶时间。
t_en: What are you two going on about? If you want to stop me, be quick about it! I'm in a hurry!

t_ch: 不说话，我就当默许了。你呢，赞达尔？
t_en: I'll take that silence as a no. You, Zandar?

t_ch: 作为敌手，我衷心希望你停下脚步。
t_en: As your enemy, I genuinely wish you would cease your actions.

t_ch: 但同为「智识」行者，如果你的灵光乍现，能为论证带来更多变量……
t_en: But should your sudden inspiration bring more variables to the proof, then as a fellow pathstrider of the Erudition...

t_ch: 我不介意亲眼见证。
t_en: I won't mind witnessing it with my own eyes.
("Curiosity.")

t_ch: （即便过去这么久，经历数不清的失败，甚至在糟糕透顶的，机器头计算中不可违逆的<color=#dbc291ff>「时刻」</color>到来时……）
t_en: (It's been so long, and we've all failed so many times. Even now, moments before the horrible and inescapable <color=#dbc291ff>"Instant"</color> within Droidhead's calculations arrives...)

t_ch: （「智识」的宠儿，人们口中的天才……）
t_en: (The cherished children of the Erudition, the geniuses lauded by all...)

t_ch: （我们心中，只有「好奇」这一种感情么？）
t_en: (Is "curiosity" the only thing we can feel, even at moments like this?)

t_ch: 倒也不坏。
t_en: Well, it's not so bad.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>现在，就让「锁」来成为钥匙吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Now, let the "lock" become the key.</color>

t_ch: 漫步群星的天才们，银河已经走到生死存亡的关头！我，天才俱乐部#83，黑塔，向你们发出召唤——
t_en: Geniuses who walk the stars! The cosmos has reached a moment where its very existence hangs in the balance! I, Herta, Genius Society #83, hereby summon you!

t_ch: 我要求，立刻召开俱乐部会议——用最宏观的思想，服务最宏伟的事业！
t_en: I request a Society meeting to be held immediately! We shall serve the grandest cause with the most macroscopic ideas!

t_ch: 据我所知，俱乐部的章程从来没有「团结」二字。
t_en: There's no such thing as "unity" in the Society's rules based on what I know.

t_ch: 诚然。有史以来，会议仅仅召开过三次。
t_en: Indeed. A meeting has only been held three times in the Society's history.

t_ch: 第一次，与会者两人；「帝皇」遇刺后，与会者七人；第二次大繁荣，与会者共五人。
t_en: The first meeting had two attendees. After the emperor was assassinated, the second meeting had seven attendees. During the Second Great Prosperity, the third meeting had five attendees.

t_ch: 这一次，又有多少人会回应？
t_en: How many will respond this time?

t_ch: 我本以为，你不会把{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#81}我{RUBY_E#}卷入这个「课题」了，黑塔。
t_en: I thought you were not going to involve {RUBY_B#Genius Society #81}me{RUBY_E#} in this "topic" anymore, Herta.

t_ch: 真是这个小魔女。早知道{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#23}我{RUBY_E#}就不跟你打赌了，波尔卡。
t_en: It really is this little witch. {RUBY_B#Genius Society #23}I{RUBY_E#} shouldn't have made the bet with you, Polka.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#4}我{RUBY_E#}一直在等你自投罗网。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Genius Society #4}I{RUBY_E#}'ve been waiting for you to offer yourself up.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#64}我{RUBY_E#}的天！熟人这么多？甚至还有位特邀嘉宾——最失败的天才，赞达尔！
t_en: Goodness gracious {RUBY_B#Genius Society #64}me{RUBY_E#}! So many familiar faces! We even have a special guest? It's that greatest failure of a genius, Zandar!

t_ch: 呵，真是一场聒噪的聚会啊。
t_en: Heh. What a noisy gathering this is.

t_ch: 可以，人比我想象中多。虽然有个家伙只是来凑热闹的。
t_en: Not bad. More people showed up than I expected, even though one is just here for the fun of it.

t_ch: 但我最{RUBY_B#波尔卡•卡卡目}希望到场的人{RUBY_E#}已经在了。
t_en: Either way, {RUBY_B#Polka Kakamond}the person I was hoping for most{RUBY_E#} is here.

t_ch: 斯蒂芬•劳艾德拒绝了邀请。他需要专心筹备攻防，无法参会。
t_en: Stephen Lloyd declined the invitation. He needs to focus on attacking and defending, and cannot attend the meeting.

t_ch: 没事，本来也不用他到场。跳过无聊的寒暄，直入主题吧。
t_en: That's fine. He doesn't need to be here anyway. Let's skip the boring introductions and cut to the chase.

t_ch: 各位，这不是一场「讨论」，而是「通知」——虽说俱乐部向来是一盘散沙，但我们至少遵守一项基本礼仪……
t_en: Folks, this is not a "discussion," but an "announcement." Though the Society has never been united, we still observe at least one basic courtesy...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>绝不插手别人的课题。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>We don't interfere with each other's research topics.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>所有人，听好了：攻克「铁墓」是本人的课题。我将在<unbreak>1.5</unbreak>个系统时内接管权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>，阻止「毁灭」——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>So listen up, all of you: conquering "Irontomb" is my research topic. I will personally take over Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> in one and a half system hours and stop the Destruction.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>一旦正面战场失利，我就会立即超频权杖，代替铁墓完成「自我加冕」，与机器头接轨。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>If the front line falls, I will immediately overclock the Scepter and complete "Self-Coronation" in Irontomb's place, and interface myself with Droidhead.</color>

t_ch: 好笑，太好笑了！你这个疯子，简直是在波尔卡刚洗好的白床单上跳踢踏舞！
t_en: That's funny! That's real funny! You madwoman! That's like watching you tap-dance on Polka's spotless white sheets right after she's washed them!

t_ch: 相当大胆。你想接入星神的机核，定义祂的「时刻」？
t_en: Very bold. You want to connect your brain to the Aeon's mechanical core and define THEIR "Instants"?

t_ch: 鲁珀特敢这么干，我为什么不敢？这里集齐了权杖原型机、博识尊之父，还有一颗天才的大脑——万事俱备。
t_en: If Rubert dared to do that, why shouldn't I? I've got the Prototype Scepter, the father of Nous, and the brain of a genius. Everything's set.

t_ch: 且不论成功率，小魔女…如果你能做到，然后呢？
t_en: Never mind the success rate, little witch... What's gonna happen if you succeed?

t_ch: 在场都是聪明人，我就直奔主题：很简单，对「智识」开刀——
t_en: We're all smart people here, so I'll just say it straight: strike at Erudition...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我将改写「第四时刻」的锚点，让银河未来朝着黑塔喜欢的方向前进！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I'll change the anchor points for the "Fourth Instant" and move the future of the cosmos in a direction I want!</color>

t_ch: 想也知道，又一位倒果为因的天才。看看「寂静领主」怎么说？
t_en: I knew it. Another genius who confuses cause with effect. What do you think about this, "Lord of Silence"?

t_ch: 你知道，这是给自己判决死刑。
t_en: You know you're signing your death sentence right here.

t_ch: 当然。判决书有两份。一份是我自己写的，另一份来自你。
t_en: Of course I do. There'll even be two copies of the verdict. One that I wrote myself, and another one coming from you.

t_ch: 所以我才希望你能到场，好亲口告诉你——我不在乎！
t_en: That's why I wanted you to be in this meeting. Now, I can tell you: I don't care about all that!

t_ch: 这是威胁：要么放下手术刀，要么跟着全银河一起完蛋。这场会唯一的目的，就是希望各位放下傲慢，别来添乱。
t_en: Consider this a threat: Either put down your scalpel, or die with the entire cosmos. The only goal I have for this meeting is to ask all of you to put aside your pride and not cause me any trouble.
Heh...

t_ch: 单纯的小姑娘，以为自己的愿望总能成真。
t_en: What a naive little girl, thinking her wishes will always come true.

t_ch: 呵呵。
t_en: Hehe.

t_ch: 你笑什么？
t_en: What are you laughing at?

t_ch: 我感到欣慰，黑塔。因为我们终究殊途同归——
t_en: I am glad, Herta. We ended up on the same page.

t_ch: 无论「毁灭智识」还是「改写时刻」，你我选择了相同的道路：否决那尊为世人圈定了边界的神明。
t_en: No matter if it was to "destroy the Erudition" or to "rewrite the Instants," we both chose the same road. We will defy the god who marked the limits of humanity.

t_ch: 单就这句话而言，我没什么好反驳的。
t_en: I'm not gonna argue with that.

t_ch: 为庆祝我们达成根本性共识，我会为你的演出准备一片舞台。
t_en: Then, to celebrate us coming to a fundamental agreement, I will prepare a stage for your performance.

t_ch: 听好，后世的天才们，以下话语出自俱乐部#1之口：结束这场可悲的会议吧。
t_en: Listen well, geniuses who came after me. Thus speaks Genius Society #1: End this pathetic meeting.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>2纳秒前，我已将黑塔的决定传达给所有「赞达尔」——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>As of two nanoseconds ago, I have passed Herta's decision to all the "Zandars" in the universe.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「我们」会成为她的代行者，阻断一切外部干涉。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"We" will become her representatives and stop all external interferences targeting her.</color>

t_ch: 这是演的哪出？
t_en: What are you playing at?

t_ch: 为什么？哦，很简单——
t_en: My reasons? Hah. It's simple.

t_ch: 「好奇」，女士，仅此而已。
t_en: "Curiosity." That is all, Madam.

t_ch: 要和「第一位天才」过上两招了么？意外之喜。
t_en: Am I going to clash blades with the First Genius? What a pleasant surprise.

t_ch: 既然立场已经明确…这场无聊的会议也该结束了。祝你好运，小姑娘。
t_en: Now that our positions are clear, it's time for this boring meeting to end. Good luck, little girl.

t_ch: 被当成配角了？该死啊！不过——
t_en: Did you all just treat me as a side character? Darn it! But anyways...

t_ch: 反正我也只是来凑热闹的，哈哈！
t_en: I'm just here for the fun! Ahahaha!

t_ch: 呵…作为量子域的「幽灵」，观测是我的天职……
t_en: Heh... As the "ghost" of the quantum domain, it is my duty to observe...

t_ch: 如果你愿意为我带一套螺丝星的茶具，我不介意出手轻轻推你一把喔，小魔女。
t_en: So if you're happy to bring me a tea set from Planet Screwllum, then I wouldn't mind giving you a helping hand, little witch.

t_ch: 等到一切结束后…再来我这品尝新出品的茶点吧。
t_en: After everything's over... come visit me and taste some of my freshly baked desserts.

t_ch: 我就知道你会说类似的话。
t_en: I knew you'd say something like that.

t_ch: 对于超出计算边界的方案，我总会给出相同的回应。
t_en: I always give the same response to plans that exceed the limits of mathematical calculations.

t_ch: 「你不知道」，对吧？
t_en: "I don't know." Right?

t_ch: 看似粗糙的四个字，却孕育了已知银河的全部智慧。
t_en: Those three words, though seemingly graceless, contain all the wisdom in the entire known cosmos.

t_ch: 俱乐部这关算是过了。现在，专注眼前吧。
t_en: Well, we passed the Society's trial. Let's focus on what we've got in front of us.

t_ch: 希望你说话算话，前辈。
t_en: I hope you hold up your end of the bargain, Senior Society Member.

t_ch: 呵。吕枯耳戈斯或许不值得信任，但赞达尔言出必行。
t_en: Heh. Lycurgus may not be trustworthy, but Zandar always follows through with his words.

t_ch: 别了，后辈们。在未来有限的时间中……
t_en: Farewell, juniors. In the limited time we have left to spend with each other...

t_ch: 诸位不必再以「赞达尔」称呼我。
t_en: You no longer need to address me as "Zandar."
Wait ...huh?

t_ch: 吕枯耳戈斯阁下，莫非……
t_en: Lord Lycurgus? Could it be...

t_ch: 正是。我已彻底切断与「赞达尔•壹•桑原」的连接。
t_en: Yes. I have completely severed my connections with "Zandar One Kuwabara."

t_ch: 世界的终幕，我会以剧中人「神礼观众」之名，将其见证。
t_en: I shall witness the end of the world in the role of "Theoros"... as a character within this play.

t_ch: 真是摸不透你。
t_en: I really don't get you.

t_ch: 或许你已习以为常，黑塔。但我还是想在这一刻重申：能与你共事，是我莫大的荣幸。
t_en: Perhaps you've heard me say this many times, Herta, but I still would like to reiterate that it's a great honor to work with you.

t_ch: 是啊。我也不止一次这么回复了……
t_en: I did hear this many times, and I've responded to you many times in the same way...

t_ch: 我对客套话过敏，严重时可能会休克。
t_en: I'm allergic to pleasantries. Keep at it, and I might go into shock.

t_ch: 斯蒂芬的工作已经完成。做好准备——
t_en: Stephen's work is done. Let's get ready.

t_ch: 早就准备好了。为我们的盟友开道吧。
t_en: I've been ready for ages. Let's open up a path for our allies.

t_ch: 计算结果：你的备用计划…成功率无限趋近于零。
t_en: Calculation results: Your backup plan... has a success rate infinitesimally close to zero.

t_ch: 那就代表能成功，不是么？
t_en: Which means it COULD work, no?

t_ch: 墓碑之下，就是此处。
t_en: This is the place below the tombstone.

t_ch: 如来古士所愿，把他的棺材刨开。
t_en: Let's open Lygus's coffin like he wanted.

t_ch: 呵，真被你猜中了。
t_en: Heh. Looks like you were right.

t_ch: 来吧，起飞。该去会会你的小宠物了，前辈。
t_en: Come on. Let's take off. It's time to go meet your little pet, Senior Society Member.

t_ch: 危险、压抑、混沌……
t_en: Dangerous. Oppressive. Chaotic...

t_ch: 美妙的啼哭。很快它就会响彻银河。
t_en: What a beautiful wail. It will soon resound throughout the entire cosmos.

t_ch: 你将开启「毁灭」的链式反应……
t_en: You will initiate the Destruction's chain reaction...

t_ch: 但你也将成为「完美学者」——
t_en: But you'll also become the "Perfect Scholar"...

t_ch: 概率：万分之一。
t_en: The chances are ten thousand to one.

t_ch: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>坚持了三千万世，孜孜不倦地赠予它翁法罗斯的「记忆」……
t_en: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> persevered for thirty million cycles and tirelessly gave the Demiurge "memories" of Amphoreus...

t_ch: 只因她「梦中的神明」留下了一丝希望，让她相信成长后的德谬歌能够对抗自己的半身——铁墓。
t_en: Only because the "god in her dreams" left a sliver of hope, making her believe that a grown Demiurge would be able to fight against their other half... Irontomb.

t_ch: 在创世涡心与海瑟音告别之际，我察觉到了「岁月」火种的异样，随即被「长夜月」拖入到「忘却」的忆潮之中…她曾是三月献出全部记忆实现的隐藏力量，如今心中却另有暗账。
t_en: As I bid farewell to Hysilens at the Vortex of Genesis, I noticed something strange about the "Time" Coreflame, and was immediately dragged into the memoria tide of "Oblivion" by "Evernight"... She was once the hidden power that March manifested by sacrificing all of her memories, yet now she harbors other secret intentions in her heart.

t_ch: 与此同时，丹恒精神折跃回到列车，却发现了窃忆者入侵。众人此时觉察到「记忆」的势力早已渗透了翁法罗斯，并阻拦了外部介入…为了与我取得联系，丹恒决心立刻返回翁法罗斯。
t_en: Meanwhile, Dan Heng warped back to the Express via a spirit warp jump, only to discover a Memosnatcher invasion. Everyone then realized that the Remembrance's forces had already permeated Amphoreus and blocked outside intervention... To establish contact with me, Dan Heng was determined to return to Amphoreus immediately.

t_ch: 在「虚假的开拓」中醒来后，我得到了昔涟与星期日的帮助逃离其中，可惜「长夜月」掌握着绝对的主动权，使我再次落入忆潮之中…不过，黑天鹅却趁此机会悄悄接近了「长夜月」。
t_en: After waking up in the "False Trailblaze," I managed to escape with help from Cyrene and Sunday. Unfortunately, "Evernight" held absolute control, causing me to fall into the memoria tide once again... However, Black Swan took this opportunity to quietly approach "Evernight."

t_ch: 重返翁法罗斯的丹恒，借用神血呼唤白厄英魂，从天而降的「毁灭」洞开了忆域，找到世界最隐秘的角落。为了追寻「长夜月」的去向，丹恒来到被烧毁的神悟树庭。
t_en: Dan Heng returned to Amphoreus and beckoned the heroic spirit of Phainon with divine blood. The Destruction, descending from the sky, pierced through the Memory Zone and discovered the most hidden corner of the world. In pursuit of "Evernight," Dan Heng arrived at the charred remnants of the Grove of Epiphany.

t_ch: 在记忆错乱的树庭，丹恒得到记忆中「丹枫」的帮助，完成了与过往的告别。「大地」的半神荒笛枯朽之余，将使命与权能尽数托付给丹恒。借助新的力量，丹恒在忆潮中找到了我。
t_en: In the Grove, where memories became disjointed, Dan Heng received help from "Dan Feng" within his memories and completed his farewell to the past. In their final moments, the "Earth" demigod Terravox entrusted all their duty and authority to Dan Heng. With this newfound strength, Dan Heng found me within the memoria tide.

t_ch: 我们进入无名泰坦大墓，发现了此地的秘密——永劫回归中三千万世的「昔涟」都会来到这里，将自己奉献给「记忆」。在黑天鹅的协同下，我们在大墓深处找到了「长夜月」。
t_en: We entered the nameless Titan's great tomb and discovered its secret... across the thirty million cycles of Eternal Recurrence, every incarnation of "Cyrene" had come here, offering herself to the Remembrance. With Black Swan's help, we found "Evernight" in the depths of the great tomb.

t_ch: 危亡关头，「长夜月」被三月的相机捕获，陷入哀丽秘榭的记忆迷宫中。经历几番长谈，三月与「长夜月」达成一致…「长夜月」归还三月的记忆，而三月也终于回到了我们的身边。
t_en: When all seemed lost, "Evernight" was captured by March's Camera and trapped within the memory maze of Aedes Elysiae. After several lengthy conversations, March and "Evernight" reached an agreement... "Evernight" returned March's memories, and March finally returned to our side.

t_ch: 再创世的所有条件均已达成。我们回到大墓深处，开启了最后的再创世仪式……
t_en: With every condition for the Era Nova fulfilled, we returned to the depths of the great tomb and initiated the final Era Nova Ceremony...

t_ch: 数个系统时前，飘荡于茫茫太空的列车车厢中
t_en: Some system hours ago, aboard the Astral Express in space...

t_ch: 在茫茫太空里拿根探针随便嗅嗅，就能找到{NICKNAME}和丹恒…你这小玩意这么厉害啊，忍者妹？
t_en: You mean you just waved a probe around in deep space and found {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng...? That little thing's really that impressive, ninja girl?

t_ch: 此乃大岚神法力加持，感应人体超低频电波的忍•科学用具是也。
t_en: This is a ninja tech device, blessed by the Great Lan. It senses the ultra-low-frequency electric waves of the human body.

t_ch: 够鸟语花香的。不过……
t_en: That's a whole lotta pretty wubbaboo. But...

t_ch: 既然人找着了，咱也就不装了。你演得倒挺像，是哪来的哈努兄弟，敢冒充巡海游侠？
t_en: Since we've found them, let's drop the act. You played it well, but who do you think you are? Brother Hanu? Thinking you can pass as a Galaxy Ranger.

t_ch: 牛仔•忍者殿下，汝无故发难，莫非是受猴子•叛忍蛊惑，堕入邪魔外道了么？
t_en: Lord Cowboy Ninja, you have turned on me for no reason. Don't tell me the traitorous Monkey Ninja bewitched you. Are you walking the path of heretics now?

t_ch: 得了吧！老子叫银枪•修罗。
t_en: Enough! My name is Silvergun Shura.

t_ch: 唉，所以我最讨厌在剧本里设置形象过于夸张的角色了。
t_en: This is why I hate putting over-the-top characters into the script.

t_ch: 你，还有这位神秘忍者妹，一个比一个难演。花导不喜欢疯子。
t_en: You, and this mysterious ninja girl... Both of you are impossible to play. Director Sparkle doesn't care for madmen.

t_ch: 少和我贫嘴。说，你此行的目的是什么？
t_en: Cut the chatter. What's your real reason for being here?

t_ch: 哎呀，假面愚者能有什么坏心思，不过是看看戏、码码牌。
t_en: Come on, what bad intentions could a Masked Fool possibly have? Just here to watch a show, shuffle a few cards.

t_ch: 我重要的两位演员在宇宙里漂流了这么久，你们愣是找不着。无奈，我只好自己来，不然之后找谁和我演对手戏呢？
t_en: My two prized actors were drifting through space for ages, and you all couldn't find them. What choice did I have but to come myself? Otherwise, who's going to share the stage with me?

t_ch: 呵…连危及寰宇的「铁墓」之灾都不当回事，我看愚者的道行也就这点档次了。
t_en: Hah... You don't even care about the Irontomb disaster threatening the whole universe? Seems the Fool's wisdom isn't all that deep.

t_ch: 游侠，别以为占个大义的名头就能对人指手画脚的。再说了，我看你也不是没有私心嘛。
t_en: Ranger, don't think waving some righteous flag gives you the right to throw sidelong jabs. And don't act like you've got no motives of your own.

t_ch: 想借着这场联系着诸神的战斗…找到帮那位<color=#dbc291ff>折足之狼</color>解脱的办法？
t_en: You're hoping this war involving the gods might be the key to freeing that <color=#dbc291ff>broken-legged wolf</color>.

t_ch: …这个情报，你还告诉了谁？
t_en: ...Who else knows about that?

t_ch: 只有我自己知道。你信吗？
t_en: Just me. Do you believe it?

t_ch: 放心，我没想着要打扰那位传奇人物。只是看你无功而返的样子，忍不住想调侃一下。
t_en: Relax. I'm not interested in disturbing that living legend. I just couldn't resist messing with you when I saw you come back empty-handed.

t_ch: 喵的…看在你救了{NICKNAME}和丹恒的份上，滚吧。
t_en: You little... Fine. Since you saved {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng. Get out of here.

t_ch: 记着你刚才说的话，别去打扰<color=#dbc291ff>老大</color>。
t_en: But remember what you said. Leave the <color=#dbc291ff>boss</color> alone.

t_ch: 不然……
t_en: Or else...

t_ch: 放一百个心啦。在花导的下一个剧本里，小灰毛才是主角～
t_en: You don't have to worry at all. In Director Sparkle's next script, Gray Hair gets the spotlight~

t_ch: 仰赖列车组牵头组建银河联军，寰宇文明才能够免于「毁灭」的摧残——这样的套话，我就不赘述了。
t_en: Let's skip the formalities about how the Express Crew led the formation of the Cosmic Alliance and saved civilization from the Destruction.

t_ch: 列车组的支持，让我们的工作在市场开拓部的施压下，依然能有条不紊地推进。
t_en: Thanks to the Express Crew's support, our operations stayed on course, even under the relentless pressure from the Marketing Development Department.

t_ch: 请你们接受战略投资部最为诚挚的感谢，姬子小姐。
t_en: Miss Himeko, the Strategic Investment Department extends its deepest thanks.

t_ch: 战略投资部在抗灾一事上付出的辛劳，寰宇有目共睹。
t_en: Your department's contributions during the crisis did not go unnoticed.

t_ch: 只是，除了御敌和赈灾，你们近日似乎还有其他事情要忙？
t_en: But besides disaster relief and holding the line, you've had your hands full with something else too, haven't you?

t_ch: 没错。此次银河联军的凯旋，为寰宇联合抵抗毁灭势力展现出宝贵的可能性。
t_en: Indeed. The Cosmic Alliance's victory this time has revealed something truly precious, a glimpse of what united civilizations can accomplish in the face of Destruction.

t_ch: 战略投资部正在总结此战的成功经验。我们希望当下一次类似的危机发生前，能建立起一套有效的对灾响应机制。
t_en: Our department is summarizing key lessons from this campaign. If another crisis of this scale appears on the horizon, we intend to have a system ready to respond.

t_ch: 若公司能够率先建立起抵御「毁灭」的前线，将是所有文明的幸运。
t_en: If the IPC can take the lead in establishing a true frontline against the Destruction, it will bring hope to every civilization.

t_ch: 此事仍少不了星穹列车的支持。等「铁墓」一事尘埃落定，我们还会与姬子小姐联系的。
t_en: Of course, that still hinges on continued support from the Astral Express. Once the Irontomb matter is settled, we will be in touch again, Miss Himeko.

t_ch: 景元将军，许久不见了。不知符玄小姐可有安全到家？
t_en: General Jing Yuan, it's been too long. Did Miss Fu Xuan return safely?

t_ch: 她呀，这回可真是在鬼门关前走了一遭。
t_en: Well, she almost had a near-death experience this time.

t_ch: 法眼为我卜测到铁墓那抹消万物的一击，同时也告诉我，这一击避无可避、十死无生。
t_en: The omniscia foresaw Irontomb's obliterating strike. It also told me there was no avoiding it, no surviving it.

t_ch: 不过，也正是在那一瞬间，戎韬将军传来讯息，「虚贞已破，吉凶可定」，随后就断了联系。
t_en: Yet in that exact moment, the Seer Strategist sent a message: "The empty fortune has cracked open, and fate can now be decided." Then we lost contact.

t_ch: 唉，好是绕口。你的好师姐也不说明白些，害得我寝食难安啊。
t_en: Alas, always so cryptic. Your brilliant senior soror never says anything plainly. Left me pacing all night.

t_ch: 将军，你骗人。
t_en: Stop lying, General.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，符卿莫气。这可是成为将军的必经之路啊。
t_en: Hahaha, no need to be upset, Master Diviner. Cryptic talk comes with the territory of being a general.

t_ch: 这一战，仙舟的将士们置身危局，却半步未退，他们的牺牲与贡献理应得到回报。
t_en: The soldiers of the Xianzhou stood firm in this battle amidst overwhelming odds. Their courage and sacrifice deserve recognition.

t_ch: 联盟所需的「烬灭金血」，无名客手中正好有那么一枚，那是翁法罗斯的英雄卡厄斯兰那赌上性命，从纳努克本尊处取来的。
t_en: And it just so happens that the Golden Blood of Ruin the Alliance needs is in the Nameless's hands. It was taken by the hero Khaslana of Amphoreus at the cost of his life, directly from Nanook THEMSELF.

t_ch: 尽管卡厄斯兰那如今已不存于世，但{NICKNAME}仍能触及他的一簇记忆。
t_en: Though Khaslana is no longer part of this world, {NICKNAME} can still reach a fragment of his memory.

t_ch: 也许，卡厄斯兰那会愿意将这份金血，交给为翁法罗斯赴汤蹈火的盟友。
t_en: Perhaps Khaslana would be willing to entrust the golden blood to an ally who went to great lengths for Amphoreus.

t_ch: 如此…甚好。我谨代表仙舟联盟，对那名为翁法罗斯的世界，和她伟大的英雄子民，致以崇高的敬意。
t_en: In that case... very well. On behalf of the Xianzhou Alliance, I offer our deepest respect to the world of Amphoreus and her brave, noble heroes.

t_ch: 以凡人之身伤及星神，哪怕只有一瞬，此番功绩，已然值得寰宇永铭。
t_en: To strike an Aeon as a mortal, even for but a fleeting instant... This deed alone deserves to be etched into the stars and remembered forever.

t_ch: 波提欧先生，真高兴在这场血战后能看见你平安无事。
t_en: Mr. Boothill, it's a relief to see you alive and well after all that bloodshed.

t_ch: 命硬，天生的。说来还得和姬子小姐说声抱歉，先前没能接上列车的联络。
t_en: Born tough. Though I oughta apologize to you, Miss Himeko, for missing the Express's signal earlier.

t_ch: 你们在第一线鏖战的英姿，公司和仙舟的军队都有目共睹。请允许我为游侠拔刀相助的勇义报以真挚的感谢。
t_en: The soldiers of both the IPC and the Xianzhou saw the way you all fought on the front lines. Please accept my sincere thanks for the bravery the Rangers showed.

t_ch: 姬子小姐不用客气，我不是领猎人，叫的人不算多。但为了这一仗碰头的游侠，大多和「毁灭」不共戴天，所以看上去确实不要命。
t_en: No need for thanks, Miss Himeko. I ain't the leader of the pack. Didn't bring many along. Most of those who showed up for this fight have a personal score to settle with the Destruction. That's why they fought like they had nothing to lose.

t_ch: 列车组还需专门感谢你和乱破小姐，在大战结束后为我们带回{NICKNAME}和丹恒。
t_en: The Express Crew owes you and Miss Rappa a special thanks for retrieving {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng after the battle.

t_ch: 权杖报废后，翁法罗斯星域空间持续紊乱了许久，哪怕有信号定位，想找到他们也并非易事。
t_en: With the Scepter put out of commission, there was a lot of chaos across the Amphoreus segmentum. Even with signal tracking, finding them was no simple task.

t_ch: 哈哈，没准她的忍法真不是开玩笑呢。
t_en: Haha, maybe her ninjutsu really is the real deal.

t_ch: 说起来，乱破小姐呢？
t_en: Speaking of which, where is Miss Rappa?

t_ch: 别担心，她去助其他游侠的阵了。星穹列车的意思，我来转达吧。
t_en: Don't worry, she's gone to help the other rangers. I'll pass on the Astral Express's message to her.

t_en: Who, me?

t_ch: 尽管来吧，我不会害怕。

t_ch: ███████你我必已无数次相遇，在宇宙的起点与终点。如先至的{RUBY_B#边星贸易战争、第一次帝皇战争、「帝皇」陨落、列神之战}第一、第二、第三、第四时刻{RUBY_E#}必已来临███████
t_en: ███████ You and I must have met countless times, at the beginning and end of the universe. Just like the preceding {RUBY_B#Borderstar Trade War, The First Emperor's War, The Fall of the Emperor, War Among the Aeons}First, Second, Third, Fourth Instants{RUBY_E#}, must surely have arrived ███
███████ I ask: If so, why do you Trailblaze ███████

t_ch: 为了联结银河，与更多势力同行。
t_en: To connect the cosmos and journey alongside more allies.

t_ch: 贯彻极致的信念，甚至取代星神。
t_en: To embody the ultimate conviction, even replacing Aeons.

t_ch: 我只想帮助每一个需要帮助的人。
t_en: I just want to help all who needed help.

t_ch: 我不知道，但不会停止旅行。
t_en: I don't know, but I won't stop the journey.

t_ch: 我不在乎，只想战胜铁墓。
t_en: It matters not, as long as Irontomb is defeated.
███████ I was told: The beginning is still unknown ███████

t_ch: ███████然终末诞生，终点必已存在███████
t_en: ███████ But if the Finality has been born, the destination must already exist ███████

t_ch: ███████可能性有四，三者已知：毁灭、虚无、同谐。无论其四，开拓必已行向终末，或成为终末███████
t_en: ███████ There are four possibilities, three of which are known: Destruction, Nihility, and Harmony. Regardless of the fourth, the Trailblaze has surely already marched toward Finality, or become the Finality itself ███
███████ I ask: If so, why do you Trailblaze ███████

t_ch: 有第四种可能性，就有希望。
t_en: A fourth possibility is all the hope we need.

t_ch: 我根本不相信「终末」。
t_en: I do not believe in the Finality.

t_ch: 无论如何，需要有人继续前进。
t_en: Regardless, someone must press on.

t_ch: 我不知道，但不会停止旅行。
t_en: I don't know, but I won't stop the journey.

t_ch: 我不在乎，只想拯救翁法罗斯。
t_en: It matters not, as long as Amphoreus is saved.
███████ I was told: The destination is still unknown ███████

t_ch: ███████诚如我之所见：开拓乃无限无序的混沌。在其道路上，星神必已陨落，命途必已崩毁。一切不复存在，存在亦不复存在███████
t_en: ███████ As I have seen it: Trailblazing is an endless, chaotic abyss. On its path, Aeons must have fallen, and THEIR Paths must have been destroyed. Everything ceases to exist, and even existence itself no longer exists ███████
███████ Nameless one, fateless one ███████

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我问：若如此，你为何开拓？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I ask: If so, why do you Trailblaze?</color>

t_ch: 你看见：祂出现了，祂必然会在这一秒出现。
t_en: You witness: THEY have appeared. THEY will have most definitively appeared at this very second.

t_ch: 千变万化的演算中，祂的光辉在众目睽睽下，降临于茫茫宇宙中。祂的身躯庞大若神物，齿轮与纤缆精妙绝伦地纠缠在一起。
t_en: In the ceaselessly mercurial extrapolations, THEIR radiance descends before all eyes, illuminating the vast cosmos. THEIR colossal form, divine in magnitude, is a marvel of intricately interwoven gears and cables.

t_ch: 祂观察、计算、求解一切。祂提出疑问、进行验证、获取解答。现在，无所不知的存在向你发问——
t_en: THEY observe, compute, and seek to solve all. THEY question, verify, and obtain resolution. Now, the all-knowing entity questions you...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我问：*你*为何开拓？</color>
t_en: I ask: Why do you Trailblaze?

t_ch: 回答。
t_en: Answer.

t_ch: 不回答。
t_en: Don't answer.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「阿基维利！」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Akivili!"</color>

t_ch: 你看见：祂消失了。只留下一个符号：<color=#dbc291ff>「！」</color>
t_en: You witness: THEY disappeared, leaving only a symbol behind: <color=#dbc291ff>"!"</color>

t_ch: 感叹号？
t_en: Exclamation point?

t_ch: 「！」——在自然语言中，人们将其添加于文句后，以表达某种复杂的情感。也许它的意思是：对已至的一切永葆惊奇。
t_en: "!"... In natural language, it's appended to sentences as a vessel of complex emotions. Perhaps it signifies a perpetual wonder at all that has come to pass.

t_ch: 逻辑非？
t_en: Logical negation?

t_ch: 「！」——在编程语言中，人们将其添加于算式前，以表示对目标值的取否。也许它的意思是：对未至的一切永怀质疑。
t_en: "!"... In programming languages, this symbol is prefixed to expressions to denote negation. Perhaps it signifies an enduring skepticism toward all that has yet to arrive.

t_ch: 但祂不再言语，这便是答案的所有。或许你回答了；或许没有。一切已然发生——
t_en: But THEY speak no more. Therein lies the entirety of the answer. Perhaps you have completed the reply, or perhaps not. All has come to pass...

t_en: {NICKNAME} █ the future of the cosmos █ is in your hands ▄▄▄▄▄▄█▀██

t_ch: 于是，花儿在旅途的终点收梢，又在起点生根。\n为昨天带去「爱」的结局。
t_en: And so, the flower fades at the journey's end, only to take root again at the journey's beginning\nIt leaves "love" as yesterday's conclusion.

t_ch: 人们看见「爱」的结局，踏上逐火的征程。\n而逐火的人们，又让花儿在明天诞生。
t_en: When people see that ending of "love," they set out on the Flame-Chase Journey.\nAnd those who chase the flame let the flower bloom anew tomorrow.

t_ch: 因果在这一行闭合…\n或者，有个更浪漫的词，封笔。
t_en: The loop of causality is closed in this line...\nOr, there's a more romantic word for it: to seal the pen.

t_ch: 光锥之内，皆是命运。你问命运，何为神性？\n而她说——
t_en: Within the Light Cone, all is fated. You ask fate, what is divinity?\nAnd she says—

t_en: "Now, open this book. I'll be waiting for you in the past."

t_ch: 二相乐园的现代科学啊。

t_en: A typical case?

t_ch: 各位外星游客可能对此类事件感到陌生…但在本地，这倒也不是什么稀罕事。
t_en: Outworld visitors might find this kind of thing strange... but it's not exactly rare around here.

t_ch: 在过去某些时代，幻造种诞生的速度就像下过雨后角落里的蘑菇一样蹭蹭窜个不停。如今虽然不同了，但稍不留神，还是有些知名漫画的角色会突然活生生地现世。
t_en: Certain historical eras had imagenae popping up non-stop like mushrooms after a shower. Things are different now, but if you're not careful, you might still find characters from popular comics suddenly show up in the flesh.

t_ch: 缘生？
t_en: Ideogenitive?

t_ch: 抱歉抱歉，用了复杂的术语。「缘生」的意思，就是因机缘而生。
t_en: Sorry, sorry, used a bit of jargon there. "Ideogenitive" here means something born of chance and circumstance.

t_ch: 这类幻造种诞生的原因都是些偶发性事件。和那些要靠绘师画出自己后代来繁衍的<color=#dbc291ff>「谱系幻造种」</color>不太一样。
t_en: These imagenae arise from incidental events. That's quite different from <color=#dbc291ff>"progenitive imagenae,"</color> which reproduce by having artists draw their offspring.

t_ch: 所以你们什么时候出动？
t_en: So when are you heading out?

t_ch: 出动？去哪儿？您是说去绘世学院逮捕这个非法幻造种吗？
t_en: Heading out? Where to? You mean going to Graphia Academy to arrest this illegal imagenae?

t_ch: 唉，不行。就在刚才我已得到了「异常防御部」的通知。本次「幻月游戏」的第一位谒者公开了自己的存在——她就是您说的这位火花小姐。
t_en: *sigh* We can't. I just received notice from the Department of Aberration Defense: The first Supplicant of these Phantasmoon Games has revealed herself, and she's none other than Miss Sparxie, the one you mentioned.

t_ch: 虽然您是星穹列车的贵客，但您完全不了解这个世界的法律和民俗。在「幻月游戏」进行期间，谒者们的行动历来不受干涉——这是他们的特权。
t_en: Although you're honored guests of the Astral Express, you seem completely unfamiliar with the laws and customs of this world. During the Phantasmoon Games, we do not traditionally interfere with Supplicants' actions. That is their privilege.

t_ch: 换言之，作为谒者，在她没有造成任何实质伤害前，我们这些治安官什么也做不了。
t_en: In other words, since she's a Supplicant, we security officers can't do anything unless she causes actual harm.

t_ch: 她劫持了一座学校啊！
t_en: She took an entire school hostage!

t_ch: 她超级危险好嘛！
t_en: She's super dangerous, okay!?

t_ch: 你说她劫持了一座学校，但我得到的消息却完全不是这么回事啊？
t_en: You say she took a school hostage, but the intel I have says otherwise.

t_ch: 对了，新闻播报要开始了，您可以看看？
t_en: Oh right, the news broadcast is about to start. Care to watch?

t_ch: 大家好，欢迎收看满愿电视台《乐园早知道》特别新闻栏目！我是主持人噗噗！
t_en: Hello everyone, welcome to Fulwish TV's special news segment, Arcadian Morning Report! I'm your host, Poofy!

t_ch: 大家好，我是主持人雪雪！
t_en: Hi everyone, I'm your host, Snowie!

t_ch: 时间跨入乐园历<unbreak>1999</unbreak>年，真是个令人期待的年份！只差一年我们就要迎接千禧年的到来啦！
t_en: We've entered Year <unbreak>1999</unbreak> of the Arcadian Calendar. What an exciting time! Just one more year until the new millennium!

t_ch: 五百多年前，著名预言家曾发布预言：「一九九九年，恐怖大魔王从天而降」！预言会成真吗？二相乐园到底能否安然无恙地跨越这关键的一年呢？
t_en: Over <unbreak>500</unbreak> years ago, a famous prophet made a prediction: "In Year <unbreak>1999</unbreak>, a terrifying devil will descend from the sky"! Will this prophecy come true? Can Planarcadia safely make it through this crucial year?

t_ch: 笨蛋，你这是在诅咒观众吗？他们收看这个节目可不是为了来听你说这些危言耸听的事情！新闻，念新闻！
t_en: You idiot! Are you cursing our viewers? They didn't tune in to hear your fearmongering nonsense! Just read the news, and stick to it!

t_ch: 好、好的！不可思议的是，仅仅十五年过去，幻月居然再度满盈，开启「幻月游戏」的时刻又一次降临，这一定是「欢愉」之主福佑乐园！
t_en: Y—Yes! Incredibly, after just fifteen years, the Phantasmoon is full again, and the time for the Phantasmoon Games is upon us once more. Surely a blessing from the Master of Elation upon this arcadia!

t_ch: 本次「幻月游戏」究竟会有哪些谒者现身，他们又会为大家带来怎样震撼心灵的奇迹呢？本台已得到「异常防御部」的许可，将全程跟踪本次「幻月游戏」的相关进展！
t_en: Which Supplicants will appear in these Phantasmoon Games, and what mind-blowing miracles will they bring to everyone? With permission from the Department of Aberration Defense, we'll be following and reporting on the Phantasmoon Games from start to finish!

t_ch: 就在刚才，第一位佩戴面具的谒者出现了！
t_en: Just now, the first masked Supplicant has appeared!

t_ch: 真令人好奇啊！这位谒者究竟是谁，又来自何方？让我们一起来看看！
t_en: How intriguing! Who are they, and where did they come from? Let's take a look!

t_ch: 哇喔！风靡网络的主播火花小姐，于两小时前宣告自己佩戴面具，成为谒者！「异常防御部」已确认了本条信息的真实性！
t_en: Wow! Internet-famous streamer Miss Sparxie announced two hours ago that she's donning a mask to become a Supplicant! The Department of Aberration Defense has confirmed the news is authentic!

t_ch: 作为缘生幻造种，火花小姐的诞生并未通过「异常防御部」的批准，但这些都不重要了。
t_en: As an ideogenitive imagenae, Miss Sparxie's birth wasn't approved by the Department of Aberration Defense, but that hardly matters at this point.

t_ch: 在本次「幻月游戏」期间，这位网络主播想要创造什么样的奇迹呢？下面，让我们切到她的直播间看看！
t_en: What sort of miracle does this livestreamer plan to produce during the Phantasmoon Games? Let's switch over to her stream and see!

t_ch: 哟吼～广告时间结束！感谢友爱保险®为本次《火花花玩转乐园》的直播企划冠名赞助！
t_en: Yoohoo! And we're back from the commercial break! A big thank you to Love Insurance® for being the title sponsor of today's Sparxtacular Arcadian Adventures livestream!

t_ch: 一人千面~千面一人♥今天的火花花又会变成谁呢？
t_en: One person, a thousand faces! A thousand faces, one person! ♥ Who will Sparxicle become today?

t_ch: 锵锵~答案揭晓！屏幕前的大家，快跟上绘世学院的校长火花花的脚步，一起来看看新来的转校生适应得怎么样了呢？
t_en: Ta-da! Time for the big reveal! Everyone, follow along with Dean Sparxie of Graphia Academy as we check out how our new transfer student is settling in!

t_ch: 三月同学，向镜头打个招呼吧~
t_en: March, say hi to the camera!

t_ch: 火花！你可别惹我！我小三月可不是什么好欺负的善茬！
t_en: Sparxie! Don't you dare mess with me! I, March, am not someone you can easily push around!

t_ch: 我…我可是「罗浮」景元将军与「朱明」怀炎将军的徒孙！我受过严格的仙舟剑术训练！别人怕你，我可不怕你！
t_en: I—I'll have you know I'm the disciple of General Jing Yuan of the Luofu and General Huaiyan of the Zhuming! I've undergone rigorous Xianzhou sword training! Others might fear you, but I sure don't!

t_ch: 这位三月同学的情绪有些激昂呢，是第一次接受直播采访太过激动的缘故吗？
t_en: My, March seems quite worked up. Is it because she's a bit nervous about her first live interview?

t_ch: 好的，那么接下来，让我来采访一下我的同事，瓦尔特老师！
t_en: Alright then, now let me interview my colleague, Mr. Yang!

t_ch: 大家好，我是绘世学院的历史老师瓦尔特•杨。很荣幸能获选本年度的「最受学生欢迎男教师」这一荣誉，接下来我将再接再厉，输送更多优质人才！
t_en: Hello everyone, I'm Welt Yang, a history teacher at Graphia Academy. I'm honored to be selected as this year's "Most Popular Male Teacher," and I will continue to strive to nurture even more outstanding talents!

t_ch: 好的，采访暂告一个段落，接下来我要向大家预告下一次的直播内容！
t_en: Alright, that wraps up our interview for now! Let me give you all a sneak peek at what's coming up in our next livestream!

t_ch: 感谢大家全心全意的支持，火花花也要努力回报大家的心意啦~♥
t_en: Thank you all for your wholehearted support! Sparxicle will work hard to repay your kindness! ♥

t_ch: 三小时后，我将和本次活动的特邀嘉宾——纵横银河、创下无数传奇的星穹列车的无名客们一起，为大家献上一场直播演出——「火花大会」！
t_en: In three hours, I'll be hosting a special livestream performance — SparxiCon — alongside our special guests, the legendary Nameless from the Astral Express who have carved countless legends across the cosmos!

t_ch: 请把消息告诉你的朋友，你的家人，还有你的敌人，让我们一起放下所有恩怨烦恼，准时进入直播间，见证今日的二相乐园绽放最灿烂的火花吧！
t_en: Tell your friends, your family... even your enemies! Let's set aside all grudges and meet in the stream to witness the most dazzling sparks light up Planarcadia!

t_ch: 您看到了吧？火花小姐只是和您的朋友一起在进行一场节目呢。没关系，没关系的！
t_en: See? Miss Sparxie was just doing a program with your friend. It's fine, really!

t_ch: 这又是什么节目？
t_en: What kind of program is this?

t_ch: 不知道你看过类似的节目没？就是明星来到某个地方干些日常工作，和普通人互换人生之类的节目。
t_en: Have you seen shows like that before? You know, where celebrities go somewhere to do everyday jobs, like those reality shows where they trade places with regular people.

t_ch: 她居然把目标选在了绘世学院？那座学校十五年前也曾经不太平过啊。
t_en: She picked Graphia Academy as her target? That school had its fair share of trouble fifteen years ago too.

t_ch: 星穹列车的一世英名啊…
t_en: Oh, the Astral Express's reputation...

t_ch: 仙舟将军的一世英名啊…
t_en: Oh, the Xianzhou General's honor...

t_ch: 哈哈哈，这就是星穹列车的无名客吗？
t_en: Hahaha, so these are the Nameless of the Astral Express?

t_ch: 好有喜感啊——听说他们是拯救过其他世界的大英雄呢，一秒无缝切换喜剧演员啊——
t_en: That's hilarious. I heard they're supposed to be great heroes who saved other worlds, but look at them now, switching to comedy in a heartbeat...

t_ch: 广场上其他观众笑得欢快，你却只感觉到一股寒意笼罩着你。
t_en: While other spectators in the plaza laugh joyfully, you can't shake off the chill creeping over you.

t_ch: （可恶…要不了多久，整个二相乐园都会听说火花把星穹列车的成员一网打尽，变成了供人调笑的谐星…咱们的名气也会变成了她的战利品。）
t_en: (Darn it... Soon the whole of Planarcadia will be saying Sparxie caught the Astral Express crew in one go and made us the butt of jokes... our reputation would also turn into her trophy.)

t_ch: 对了，请收好这份《幻月游戏突发事件应对指南》，其中有些段落也许能帮上忙。
t_en: Oh right, please keep this Phantasmoon Games Emergency Response Guide safe. Some sections in it might come in handy.

t_ch: 如果没别的事情，我就先走了，再见。
t_en: If there's nothing else, I'll be going now. See you.

t_ch: 瞧瞧，我说什么来着。报警也没用。
t_en: See? I told you so. Even calling the police was useless.

t_ch: 眼下唯一能救他们的，只有你了……
t_en: Right now, you're their only hope...

t_ch: …还有你们那位红色的大姐头。她来了喔。
t_en: ...and that red boss lady of yours. She's here too.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你还好吗？逃出来时没受伤吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, are you alright? Did you get hurt when you ran away?

t_ch: 你向姬子展示了一位少女为你画下的奇怪面具。
t_en: You showed Himeko the strange mask that a young girl drew for you.

t_ch: …所以，眼下三月和瓦尔特都被困在了绘世学院里？面具也被这个叫火花的家伙夺走了？
t_en: ...So March and Welt are both trapped in Graphia Academy now? And that girl called Sparxie took the mask, too?

t_ch: 是我不够警惕。
t_en: I wasn't vigilant enough.

t_ch: 是我不够强大。
t_en: I wasn't strong enough.

t_ch: 不，不是你的错。是我低估了这场游戏背后的复杂局势。
t_en: No, it's not your fault. I underestimated the complexity of the situation behind these games.

t_ch: 重返故乡，本意是让大家享受一场轻松的度假，也想让你和三月体验一番这个世界「欢愉」的氛围。
t_en: Coming back to my homeland was meant to be a relaxing vacation for everyone, and I also wanted you and March to experience the atmosphere of Elation in this world.

t_ch: 在过去「幻月游戏」的历史中，谒者之间不乏有彼此合作的事迹。
t_en: Throughout the history of the Phantasmoon Games, there have been many instances of cooperation between Supplicants.

t_ch: 但这一次，银河中的各路人马却把它当成了互相掰手腕的牌桌。
t_en: But this time, forces from across the cosmos have turned this into their own high-stakes poker table.

t_ch: 比起践行「欢愉」，牌手们更想独尝胜利的喜悦，迫不及待把其他人踢出局。
t_en: Rather than honoring the Elation, these players are far more eager to savor victory for themselves, itching to knock everyone else out of the game.

t_ch: 火花就是这样的搅局者。
t_en: Sparxie is one such troublemaker.

t_ch: 不能让她得逞！
t_en: We can't let her get away with this!

t_ch: 现在就回学校救人吧？
t_en: Should we head back to school and save everyone now?

t_ch: 在不清楚火花「做了什么」和「要做什么」的情况下，光凭一腔勇气闯回学校可是很危险的。
t_en: It's dangerous to rush back to school on courage alone when we don't know what Sparxie "has done" and what she's "planning to do."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff> 对每一位谒者来说，加入「幻月游戏」后至少需要完成三个重要行动——「唱名」、「奇迹」和「宣扬」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>For every Supplicant, there are three key acts that must be completed once the Phantasmoon Games begin: the "roll-call," the "miracle," and the "promotion."</color>

t_ch: 火花已经完成了「唱名」。她夺走面具，宣布自己加入游戏。这也让所有人的目光都被「第一名谒者出现」的新闻吸引。
t_en: Sparxie has completed the "roll-call." She took the mask and declared her entry into the games, drawing everyone's attention to the news that "the first Supplicant has appeared."

t_ch: 接下来，她要努力促成「奇迹」：承载民众的愿望，完成壮举予以回应。
t_en: Next, she must strive to make a "miracle" happen: bear the people's wishes and answer with a great feat.

t_ch: 如果我猜的没错，火花也在等我们自投罗网。对她来说，这场谒者间的第一战不会有比星穹列车更好的对手了——
t_en: If I'm not mistaken, Sparxie is waiting for us to walk right into her trap. For her, there couldn't be a better opponent than the Astral Express for this first battle between Supplicants...

t_ch: 能在自己精心布置的战场上，击败银河闻名的大英雄，还有什么能比这条新闻更撼动人心？
t_en: What could be more earth-shattering than defeating a renowned cosmic hero on a battlefield of her own meticulous design?

t_ch: 那么问题来了，花火，以你对这个「冒牌货」的了解，她加入游戏到底要做什么？只是戏弄和击败列车组显然不够，她到底要完成怎样惊天动地的「奇迹」？
t_en: So here's the question, Sparkle: Based on what you know about this impostor, what's her real agenda for joining the Games? Simply toying with and defeating the Express crew alone won't be enough. What kind of world-shaking "miracle" is she after?
Hmm...

t_ch: 虽说是个冒牌货，但好歹也是花火大人的冒牌货嘛，光靠猜又怎么能猜得中嘛。
t_en: Sure, she's a fake, but she's still a fake of Miss Sparkle. Guessing won't get us far.

t_ch: 要我说…去「酒馆」查查呗，也许会有线索！
t_en: If you ask me... we should check out the tavern. Might find some leads there!

t_ch: 你说的是…你们那个酒馆？
t_en: You mean... your tavern?

t_ch: …什么地方？
t_en: ...What kinda place is that?

t_ch: 假面愚者的总部…「世界尽头」酒馆。
t_en: The Masked Fools' headquarters... the "World's End" Tavern.

t_ch: 没错。要搞惊天动地的大事，又怎么能少了花火大人多年来收藏的宝贝呢？
t_en: That's right. How could we pull off something this insane without Miss Sparkle's prized collection I've been hoarding all these years?

t_ch: 那个冒牌货应该很明白这一点。在这趟行动前，她肯定去过「酒馆」…用我的名义。
t_en: That imposter must've known this well. Before this operation, she definitely went to the tavern... using my name.

t_ch: 大多数愚者分不清我和那个冒牌货的区别，也可能不在乎。但只要找出「我」和谁聊过什么，「我」又从我的库藏道具里偷走了哪件宝贝，自然就能知道冒牌货想做什么了。
t_en: Most Fools can't tell the difference between me and that imposter, or maybe they just don't care. But if we can find out who "I" talked to and which treasures "I" stole from my collection of items, we'll naturally figure out what that imposter is up to.

t_ch: 这是个不错的法子。但我不能让你一个人行动，带我们俩进「酒馆」，能做到吧？
t_en: That's a good plan, but I can't let you act alone. Can you take both of us into the tavern?

t_ch: 拿好这张名片，「酒馆」的地址就印在这上面。不过，去「酒馆」的路要你们自己走，这是它成立起就有的规矩，我也没法子。
t_en: Take this business card. The address of the tavern is printed on it. However, you'll have to find your own way to the tavern. That's been the rule since it was established, and there's nothing I can do about it.

t_ch: 既然还有时间，我就先出发咯。你们俩，准备好就来吧。
t_en: Since there's still time, I'll head out first. You two can come over when you're ready.

t_ch: 三月、杨叔…
t_en: March, Mr. Yang...

t_ch: 花火…值得信任吗？
t_en: Can Sparkle... be trusted?

t_ch: 我看她更需要我们。
t_en: I'd say she needs us more than we need her.

t_ch: 放轻松，{NICKNAME}。<color=#dbc291ff>要踏入「欢愉」的仪式，重要的就是松弛感。</color>
t_en: Relax, {NICKNAME}. <color=#dbc291ff>To step into the Elation's rite, what you need the most is ease.</color>

t_ch: 不要随你的敌人起舞，而是要找准自己的节奏。
t_en: Don't dance to your enemy's tune. Find your own rhythm.

t_ch: 现在，该我们踏出自己的舞步了。
t_en: Now it's our turn to set the steps.

t_ch: 「世界尽头」酒馆，地址：鸽川区，共愿帮事务所附近
t_en: "World's End" Tavern, Location: Dovebrook District, near the Synwish Syndicate Office

t_ch: 鸽川区啊…好久没回家看看了。正好丹恒和星期日那边也有些新发现，我让他们稍后和我们碰头。
t_en: Dovebrook District... It's been a while since I've been home. Perfect timing. Dan Heng and Sunday have made some new discoveries. I asked them to meet up with us later.

t_ch: 姬子的家在鸽川区？
t_en: Himeko's home is in Dovebrook District?

t_ch: 姬子长大的地方？
t_en: The place where Himeko grew up?

t_ch: 可不要有什么太高期待哦。
t_en: Don't get your hopes up too high.

t_ch: （是个挺繁华的城区啊…姬子过去就在这儿吗？）
t_en: (Quite a bustling district... Is this really where Himeko lived back then?)

t_ch: 十五年没回来看看了，不知那些房子如今是租借给了别人，还是被变卖出售了……
t_en: It's been fifteen years since I've been back... I wonder what's become of these houses now... If they're being rented out, or if they've been sold off already?

t_ch: 走吧，路上注意安全。
t_en: Let's go. Stay safe on the road.

t_ch: 等之后有空了，我们再到处闲逛吧。
t_en: Once we've got some time to spare, let's go explore a bit.

t_ch: 关于赔、赔偿的事情，本狸一点都不敢忘呢。
t_en: Rest assured, I haven't forgotten a single thing about the c—c—compensation.

t_ch: （这只狸猫为了赔偿居然在杂志社的门口一直等着…这合狸吗？）
t_en: (This furbo was actually waiting outside the magazine's office just to make amends...? Furbo absurdo!)

t_ch: 这位是……？
t_en: And you are...
